rawName: Engine Failure Airborne, Prior to VMC
drillName: Engine Failure Airborne — Prior to VMC [Airborne]
sourceNote: AFM-only training transcription from Viking Air PSM 1-63-1A Revision 53, Section 3.3.2, page 3-12. The memory list contains the complete actions printed in bold. AFM warning: rotation must not be initiated before VMC. Crew-role fields are trainer UI assignments only; they are not approved PF/PM callouts or operator SOP. Verify applicability against the aircraft-specific AFM, amendments, supplements, and operator procedures.

memory.action: Power levers — Retard as needed to maintain aircraft control.
Land straight ahead; turn only to avoid obstacles using minimal bank angle.
